answers: Typography is the art of arranging text to make it readable, appealing, and effective. It covers font selection, size, spacing, line height, and hierarchy.
Typography holo text er design — kono font use korbe, size koto hobe, spacing kemon hobe eishob decide kora. Good typography makes content easy to read.
For web design, popular fonts include Inter, Roboto, Open Sans, and Poppins. Pair a serif heading with a sans-serif body for contrast. Keep body text at 16px minimum for readability.
Typography involves choosing typefaces, setting line heights, managing whitespace, and creating visual hierarchy. A well-designed typographic system makes your content scannable and professional.
